scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: bash -c 'cd apps/api && fuser -k 8000/tcp 2>/dev/null; export $(grep -v "^#" .env | xargs); while true; do .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload; sleep 2; done'
